resultList.dtldesc: Property Details::::This thoughtfully designed 3 BHK apartment is available for sale in the highly sought after locality of Manikonda, Hyderabad. Situated in Alkapur Township, Necknampur Village, the property offers an excellent opportunity for homebuyers seeking a modern residence in a rapidly developing residential area. Priced at Rs 1.20 Crore, this apartment combines a strategic location, spacious layout, and strong investment potential, making it ideal for both end users and investors.::::Property Specifications::::The apartment features a carpet area of 1100 sq ft and is located on the fourth floor of a five storey residential building. The well planned layout includes three spacious bedrooms, three bathrooms, and two balconies that provide ample natural light and ventilation. The apartment is west facing and comes with one covered parking space for added convenience. Offered in unfurnished condition, the property allows buyers to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences. The apartment features durable ceramic tile flooring and is held under freehold ownership, ensuring complete ownership rights. The property is currently under construction, offering the advantage of acquiring a modern home in a developing neighborhood.::::Facility::::Residents can enjoy essential conveniences designed for comfortable living. The building is equipped with a lift for easy access to all floors, while the covered parking facility ensures secure vehicle parking. The spacious floor plan and multiple balconies create a bright and airy living environment. The apartment is located within a peaceful residential setting and offers a practical layout suitable for modern family living.::::Locality::::Located in Alkapur Township, Manikonda, the property enjoys excellent connectivity to major IT hubs, business districts, educational institutions, and healthcare facilities across Hyderabad. The apartment is close to well maintained parks and several reputed international schools, making it an attractive choice for families. The area is surrounded by supermarkets, restaurants, shopping centers, banks, and daily convenience stores. Easy access to Gachibowli, Financial District, HITEC City, and Outer Ring Road further enhances the property's appeal. With its growing infrastructure and strong residential demand, Manikonda continues to be one of Hyderabad's preferred locations for homebuyers and investors.

resultList.dtldesc: 3 BHK Flat for Sale in Urban Rise Oncloud 33 , Bachupally, Hyderabad, located in the fast-growing residential area of Bachupally in Hyderabad, this spacious 3 BHK apartment in Urban Rise offers a modern and comfortable living environment. The locality is known for its good infrastructure, proximity to educational institutions, hospitals, and convenient connectivity to major parts of the city. With Mamatha Hospital located nearby, residents can enjoy easy access to healthcare and other essential services, making the location suitable for families and professionals.Property SpecificationsThis apartment features a super builtup area of approximately 1353 sq. ft and a carpet area of about 876 sq. ft, providing a welldesigned layout suitable for family living. The property is located on the 22nd floor of a 33storey residential building, offering good natural light, ventilation, and pleasant views of the surroundings. The apartment is available under resale transaction and is ready to move, making it ideal for buyers looking for immediate possession.The flat includes three bedrooms and two bathrooms, designed to provide adequate space and comfort for residents. It also features one balcony, which offers views of the main road and landscaped garden areas while allowing fresh air and natural light to enter the home. The layout includes a combined living and dining area, creating an open and functional living space.The apartment is unfurnished, allowing buyers the flexibility to design and furnish the interiors according to their personal preferences. The kitchen is designed as a modular kitchen without a chimney, providing practical cooking space. The flooring throughout the apartment is finished with vitrified tiles, giving the home a modern and durable finish. The property is Vastu compliant and east facing, which is often preferred for favourable light and ventilation. The building is newly constructed, ensuring modern construction quality and contemporary design.FacilitiesResidents benefit from essential facilities including 24hour water supply, 100 power backup, security services, and CCTV surveillance for safety and convenience. The building also provides eight lifts for smooth movement across floors and includes one covered parking space for residents. The project also offers modern lifestyle amenities, enhancing the overall living experience.LocalityUrban Rise  is located in Bachupally, Hyderabad, with schools and Mamatha Hospital located adjacent to the property, ensuring excellent convenience for residents. Markets and other daily necessities are easily accessible, while railway connectivity is approximately 7 km away. With its spacious layout and excellent location, this apartment is an ideal choice for families seeking a modern home in Bachupally

resultList.dtldesc: This sophisticated 3 BHK apartment in Serilingampally, Hyderabad, offers an exceptional residential opportunity in one of the city's most prominent IT and residential corridors. Situated within the prestigious My Home Sayuk project, this property is designed to provide a blend of luxury and functional living, making it an ideal choice for professionals and families seeking a high-quality home with excellent proximity to the Financial District and Hitech City.::::Property Specifications::The residence features an expansive super area of 2,260 sq. ft, providing a spacious and airy environment. Positioned on a higher floor of a modern multi-storey tower, the apartment is east-facing, ensuring it is well-lit with natural light and benefits from superior ventilation throughout the day. The layout includes three large bedrooms and three modern bathrooms, along with a well-proportioned balcony that offers pleasant views of the landscaped community. Offered in an unfurnished state, the property serves as a versatile canvas for residents to customise their interiors. High-quality vitrified tile flooring and premium fittings are standard throughout the home, ensuring a refined and professional finish.::::Facilities::Residents of this development have access to a comprehensive range of premium facilities designed for a secure and active lifestyle. The property includes dedicated parking spaces and ensures a continuous water supply along with a 100% power backup system. The gated community features advanced security with on-site personnel and CCTV surveillance to maintain a safe environment. For leisure and wellness, the project offers a state-of-the-art clubhouse, a swimming pool, a well-equipped gymnasium, and beautifully landscaped gardens. Additional conveniences such as high-speed elevators and professional maintenance services further enhance the living experience.::::Locality::Situated strategically in Serilingampally, the property enjoys unparalleled connectivity to Gachibowli and the Outer Ring Road. The neighbourhood is a premier residential hub, offering easy access to reputable educational institutions like Oakridge International School and top-tier healthcare facilities such as Citizens Specialty Hospital. For shopping and recreation, the nearby Sarath City Capital Mall and various local markets provide a wide array of options. The area is well-served by public transport, including the Lingampally Railway Station and several metro stations, ensuring a streamlined commute for professionals working in the surrounding commercial zones.
